creator: lkoeller@cc.fh-lippe.de
text:
Update fftw-2.1.1 to fftw-2.1.2 (can be done very fast and auickly)

Fix: 

In the ports Makefile change DISTNAME to

		DISTNAME=       fftw-2.1.2

	and in the checksum in files/md5 to

		MD5 (fftw-2.1.2.tar.gz) = 885a4f9a41b1d55690dd384a25bb2019


Thanks an regards

Lars
